options.raw_message:
{{JSON.stringify({
  service_name: page.variables.selectedService,
  config_param_name: page.variables.selectedConfig,
  dimensions: page.variables.conditionToBeDeletedDimens,
  override_lower_dimensions: false,
  pre_approval: {
    type: components.efbd7a5e-1ad1-486b-a6a5-c967ee342150.value === "" ? 0 : 1,
    pre_approval_link: components.efbd7a5e-1ad1-486b-a6a5-c967ee342150.value === ""
      ? ""
      : `https://swiggy.atlassian.net/browse/${components.efbd7a5e-1ad1-486b-a6a5-c967ee342150.value}`
  },
  skip_approval_reason: !page.variables.hideNewFeatures && page.variables.isNonTech
    ? 2
    : components.efbd7a5e-1ad1-486b-a6a5-c967ee342150.value === ""
      ? (components.99eb67a7-577e-4862-bd23-3fb10895f5a1.value === true ? 1 : 0)
      : 0
})}}
